# magetypes public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: magetypes.txt 2241 lines (supported surface) | magetypes.features.txt 75 added (features: avx512,std,w512) | magetypes.internal.txt 42 lines (49 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                12
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)       377
#   pub consts/statics                        228
#   free functions                           2832
#   inherent methods                         1123
#   enum variants                               1
#   re-exports                                  2

## items (2017 lines)

pub trait prelude::F32x16FromHalves: simd::backends::F32x16Backend + simd::backends::F32x8Backend + archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static [also: simd::generic]

pub mod simd
pub mod simd::backends
pub trait simd::backends::F32x16Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::F32x16Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::ceil(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::floor(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::from_array(self, [f32; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::load(self, &[f32; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::recip(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::round(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::splat(self, f32) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::sqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [f32; 16])
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [f32; 16]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::F32x16Convert: simd::backends::F32x16Backend + simd::backends::I32x16Backend + archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::bitcast_f32_to_i32(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::bitcast_i32_to_f32(self, <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::convert_f32_to_i32(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::convert_f32_to_i32_round(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::convert_i32_to_f32(self, <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::F32x4Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::F32x4Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::ceil(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::floor(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::from_array(self, [f32; 4]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::load(self, &[f32; 4]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::recip(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::round(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::splat(self, f32) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::sqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [f32; 4])
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::store_rgba_bytes(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> [u8; 16]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [f32; 4]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::to_u8_bytes(self, Self::Repr) -> [u8; 4]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::F32x4Convert: simd::backends::F32x4Backend + simd::backends::I32x4Backend + archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Convert::bitcast_f32_to_i32(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x4Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x4Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Convert::bitcast_i32_to_f32(self, <Self as simd::backends::I32x4Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::F32x4Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Convert::convert_f32_to_i32(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x4Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x4Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Convert::convert_f32_to_i32_round(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x4Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x4Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Convert::convert_i32_to_f32(self, <Self as simd::backends::I32x4Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::F32x4Backend>::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::F32x8Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::F32x8Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::ceil(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::floor(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::load(self, &[f32; 8]) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::recip(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::round(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::splat(self, f32) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::sqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [f32; 8])

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [f32; 8]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::to_u8_bytes(self, Self::Repr) -> [u8; 8]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::transpose_8x8_repr(self, [Self::Repr; 8]) -> [Self::Repr; 8]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr

pub type simd::backends::F64x8Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::ceil(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::floor(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::from_array(self, [f64; 8]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::load(self, &[f64; 8]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::recip(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f64
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f64
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f64
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::round(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::splat(self, f64) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::sqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [f64; 8])
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [f64; 8]
pub fn simd::backends::F64x8Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::I16x16Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::I16x16Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::all_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::any_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::bitmask(self, Self::Repr) -> u32
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::from_array(self, [i16; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::load(self, &[i16; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> i16
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::shl_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::shr_arithmetic_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::shr_logical_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::splat(self, i16) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [i16; 16])
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [i16; 16]
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::I16x16Bitcast: simd::backends::I16x16Backend + simd::backends::U16x16Backend + archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub fn simd::backends::I16x16Bitcast::bitcast_i16_to_u16(self, <Self as simd::backends::I16x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::U16x16Backend>::Repr

pub type simd::backends::I16x32Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::I16x32Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub type simd::backends::I64x2Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync

pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::any_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool

pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::load(self, &[i64; 2]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> i64
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::shl_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::shr_arithmetic_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::shr_logical_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::splat(self, i64) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [i64; 2])
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [i64; 2]
pub fn simd::backends::I64x2Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::I8x64Backend::splat(self, i8) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I8x64Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [i8; 64])

pub trait simd::backends::U16x16Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::U16x16Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::all_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::any_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::bitmask(self, Self::Repr) -> u32
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::from_array(self, [u16; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::load(self, &[u16; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> u16
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::shl_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::shr_logical_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::splat(self, u16) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [u16; 16])
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [u16; 16]
pub fn simd::backends::U16x16Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::U16x32Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::U16x32Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::all_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::any_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::bitmask(self, Self::Repr) -> u64
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> u16
pub fn simd::backends::U16x32Backend::shl_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::splat(self, u64) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [u64; 2])
pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [u64; 2]
pub fn simd::backends::U64x2Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr

pub trait simd::backends::U64x4Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::U64x4Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::all_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::any_true(self, Self::Repr) -> bool
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::bitmask(self, Self::Repr) -> u32
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::from_array(self, [u64; 4]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::load(self, &[u64; 4]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> u64
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::shl_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::shr_logical_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::splat(self, u64) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [u64; 4])
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [u64; 4]
pub fn simd::backends::U64x4Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::U64x4Bitcast: simd::backends::U64x4Backend + simd::backends::I64x4Backend + archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static

pub fn simd::f32x1::min(self, Self) -> Self [also: prelude::f32x16<T>, prelude::f32x4<T>, prelude::f32x8<T>, prelude::f64x2<T>, prelude::f64x4<T>, prelude::f64x8<T>, prelude::i16x16<T>, prelude::i16x32<T>, prelude::i16x8<T>, prelude::i32x16<T>, prelude::i32x4<T>, prelude::i32x8<T>, prelude::i64x2<T>, prelude::i64x4<T>, prelude::i64x8<T>, prelude::i8x16<T>, prelude::i8x32<T>, prelude::i8x64<T>, prelude::u16x16<T>, prelude::u16x32<T>, prelude::u16x8<T>, prelude::u32x16<T>, prelude::u32x4<T>, prelude::u32x8<T>, prelude::u64x2<T>, prelude::u64x4<T>, prelude::u64x8<T>, prelude::u8x16<T>, prelude::u8x32<T>, prelude::u8x64<T>, simd::f32x1]
pub fn simd::f32x1::mul_add(self, Self, Self) -> Self [also: prelude::f32x16<T>, prelude::f32x4<T>, prelude::f32x8<T>, prelude::f64x2<T>, prelude::f64x4<T>, prelude::f64x8<T>, simd::f32x1, simd::f64x1]
pub fn simd::f32x1::mul_sub(self, Self, Self) -> Self [also: prelude::f32x16<T>, prelude::f32x4<T>, prelude::f32x8<T>, prelude::f64x2<T>, prelude::f64x4<T>, prelude::f64x8<T>, simd::f32x1]

pub trait SimdTypes: archmage::tokens::SimdToken
pub type SimdTypes::F32
pub type SimdTypes::F64
pub type SimdTypes::I16
pub type SimdTypes::I32
pub type SimdTypes::I64
pub type SimdTypes::I8

pub type SimdTypes::U32
pub type SimdTypes::U64
pub type SimdTypes::U8
pub const SimdTypes::F32_LANES: usize
pub const SimdTypes::F64_LANES: usize
pub const SimdTypes::I32_LANES: usize
pub trait WidthDispatch: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + core::marker::Copy
pub type WidthDispatch::F32x16
pub type WidthDispatch::F32x4
pub type WidthDispatch::F32x8
pub type WidthDispatch::F64x2
pub type WidthDispatch::F64x4
pub type WidthDispatch::F64x8
pub type WidthDispatch::I16x16
pub type WidthDispatch::I16x32
pub type WidthDispatch::I16x8
pub type WidthDispatch::I32x16
pub type WidthDispatch::I32x4
pub type WidthDispatch::I32x8
pub type WidthDispatch::I64x2
pub type WidthDispatch::I64x4
pub type WidthDispatch::I64x8
pub type WidthDispatch::I8x16
pub type WidthDispatch::I8x32
pub type WidthDispatch::I8x64
pub type WidthDispatch::U16x16
pub type WidthDispatch::U16x32
pub type WidthDispatch::U16x8
pub type WidthDispatch::U32x16
pub type WidthDispatch::U32x4
pub type WidthDispatch::U32x8
pub type WidthDispatch::U64x2
pub type WidthDispatch::U64x4
pub type WidthDispatch::U64x8
pub type WidthDispatch::U8x16
pub type WidthDispatch::U8x32
pub type WidthDispatch::U8x64
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x16_load(self, &[f32; 16]) -> Self::F32x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x16_splat(self, f32) -> Self::F32x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x16_zero(self) -> Self::F32x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x4_load(self, &[f32; 4]) -> Self::F32x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x4_splat(self, f32) -> Self::F32x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x4_zero(self) -> Self::F32x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x8_load(self, &[f32; 8]) -> Self::F32x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x8_splat(self, f32) -> Self::F32x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::f32x8_zero(self) -> Self::F32x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x2_load(self, &[f64; 2]) -> Self::F64x2
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x2_splat(self, f64) -> Self::F64x2
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x2_zero(self) -> Self::F64x2
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x4_load(self, &[f64; 4]) -> Self::F64x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x4_splat(self, f64) -> Self::F64x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x4_zero(self) -> Self::F64x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x8_load(self, &[f64; 8]) -> Self::F64x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x8_splat(self, f64) -> Self::F64x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::f64x8_zero(self) -> Self::F64x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x16_load(self, &[i16; 16]) -> Self::I16x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x16_splat(self, i16) -> Self::I16x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x16_zero(self) -> Self::I16x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x32_load(self, &[i16; 32]) -> Self::I16x32
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x32_splat(self, i16) -> Self::I16x32
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x32_zero(self) -> Self::I16x32
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x8_load(self, &[i16; 8]) -> Self::I16x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x8_splat(self, i16) -> Self::I16x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i16x8_zero(self) -> Self::I16x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x16_load(self, &[i32; 16]) -> Self::I32x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x16_splat(self, i32) -> Self::I32x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x16_zero(self) -> Self::I32x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x4_load(self, &[i32; 4]) -> Self::I32x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x4_splat(self, i32) -> Self::I32x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x4_zero(self) -> Self::I32x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x8_load(self, &[i32; 8]) -> Self::I32x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x8_splat(self, i32) -> Self::I32x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i32x8_zero(self) -> Self::I32x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x2_load(self, &[i64; 2]) -> Self::I64x2
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x2_splat(self, i64) -> Self::I64x2
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x2_zero(self) -> Self::I64x2
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x4_load(self, &[i64; 4]) -> Self::I64x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x4_splat(self, i64) -> Self::I64x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x4_zero(self) -> Self::I64x4
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x8_load(self, &[i64; 8]) -> Self::I64x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x8_splat(self, i64) -> Self::I64x8
pub fn WidthDispatch::i64x8_zero(self) -> Self::I64x8

pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x16_splat(self, i8) -> Self::I8x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x16_zero(self) -> Self::I8x16
pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x32_load(self, &[i8; 32]) -> Self::I8x32
pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x32_splat(self, i8) -> Self::I8x32
pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x32_zero(self) -> Self::I8x32
pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x64_load(self, &[i8; 64]) -> Self::I8x64
pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x64_splat(self, i8) -> Self::I8x64
pub fn WidthDispatch::i8x64_zero(self) -> Self::I8x64

## auto traits

10 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
prelude::f32x16<T>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Unpin !UnwindSafe
